title: MetaDNS: Enhancing Exploration in Discrete Neural Samplers via Well-Tempered Metadynamics
summary: Sampling from discrete distributions with multiple modes and energy barriers is fundamental to machine learning and computational physics. Recent discrete neural samplers like MDNS suffer from mode collapse and fail to sample high-energy barrier regions between modes, which is critical for free energy estimation and understanding phase transitions. We propose Metadynamics Discrete Neural Sampler (MetaDNS), a general framework integrating well-tempered metadynamics into discrete diffusion or autoregressive samplers. By maintaining an adaptive, history-dependent bias potential along selected low-dimensional coordinates, MetaDNS forces exploration of previously inaccessible regions, enabling free energy reconstruction infeasible with standard neural samplers due to a lack of high-energy samples. On challenging low-temperature benchmarks including Ising, Potts, and the copper-gold binary alloy, MetaDNS reproduces the thermodynamic distribution. Compared to MCMC-based metadynamics, MetaDNS also achieves comparable exploration requiring fewer bias deposition steps.

AI.tldr: 提出MetaDNS框架，将井温元动力学（well-tempered metadynamics）集成到离散扩散或自回归采样器中，通过自适应历史依赖偏置势迫使探索高能垒区域，解决离散神经采样器（如MDNS）的模式坍塌问题，在Ising、Potts和铜金二元合金等低温基准上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 离散神经采样器（如MDNS）在处理多模态离散分布时存在模式坍塌问题，无法采样高能垒区域，这对于自由能估计和相变理解至关重要，因此需要一种能有效探索这些区域的通用框架。
AI.method: 将井温元动力学（well-tempered metadynamics）引入离散扩散或自回归采样器，沿选定的低维坐标维护自适应的历史依赖偏置势，迫使模型探索先前无法访问的区域。
AI.result: 在Ising模型、Potts模型和铜金二元合金等挑战性低温基准上，MetaDNS成功复现了热力学分布，且相比基于MCMC的元动力学，MetaDNS以更少的偏置沉积步骤实现了同等的探索能力。
AI.conclusion: MetaDNS是一个通用框架，能有效解决离散神经采样器的模式坍塌问题，实现自由能重建，在效率和性能上优于标准神经采样器和MCMC方法。

title: Dominant vibronic relaxation channels in a europium-based molecular qubit
summary: Molecular spin qubits offer a versatile platform for quantum information processing due to their synthetic tunability and well-defined electronic structure. Here, a fitted-parameter-free computational framework combining density functional theory (DFT), time-dependent DFT (TD-DFT), and Redfield theory is applied to investigate the longitudinal spin-lattice relaxation time $T_1$ of the Eu nuclear spin qubit Eu(dpphen)(NO3)3. Using a single-molecule gas-phase model, the experimental long relaxation component $T_{1,\mathrm{long}} = 41.39$ s is reproduced within a factor of 1.4 (calculated: 55.88 s at 4.2 K), indicating that the slow relaxation channel is governed by intramolecular vibronic coupling. In contrast, the calculated $T_{1,\mathrm{short}}$ deviates by a factor of 66, highlighting the importance of crystal lattice and intermolecular effects absent from the model. The experimental $^5D_0 \rightarrow {}^7F_0$ optical transition is reproduced to within 1.1%, supporting the accuracy of the electronic structure description. Vibrational analysis identifies a large-amplitude dpphen rocking mode at a frequency of $332.02~\mathrm{cm}^{-1}$ as the dominant vibronic coupling channel, while electric field gradient (EFG) derivative analysis independently identifies another nitrate-rocking mode at $180.57~\mathrm{cm}^{-1}$ as the primary modulator of the nuclear spin environment via nitrate motion. These results are consistent with a near-maximal quadrupole asymmetry parameter $η= 0.941$, which creates state mixing through off-diagonal quadrupolar terms. Overall, the results establish a single-molecule relaxation baseline and suggest targeted ligand rigidification and substitution strategies to suppress decoherence.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了一种无拟合参数的计算框架（DFT/TD-DFT + Redfield理论），成功复现了Eu核自旋量子比特Eu(dpphen)(NO3)3的纵向弛豫时间T1。长弛豫分量计算值与实验值吻合良好（55.88 s vs 41.39 s，误差因子1.4），揭示了分子内振动耦合主导慢弛豫通道；而短弛豫分量的计算偏差（因子66）凸显了晶格和分子间效应的重要性。研究识别出两种主导振动模式（dpphen摆动模332 cm⁻¹和硝酸根摆动模180.57 cm⁻¹），并提出了配体刚化和取代策略以抑制退相干。
AI.motivation: 分子自旋量子比特因其合成可调性和明确的电子结构而成为量子信息处理的理想平台，但对其自旋-晶格弛豫时间T1的微观机制理解仍不充分。本文旨在建立一个无拟合参数的理论框架，从第一性原理揭示核自旋量子比特的弛豫机制，为分子设计提供理论指导。
AI.method: 采用DFT、TD-DFT与Redfield理论相结合的无拟合参数计算框架，基于单分子气相模型，计算Eu(dpphen)(NO3)3的纵向自旋-晶格弛豫时间T1。通过振动分析和电场梯度（EFG）导数分析，识别主导振动耦合模式。
AI.result: 长弛豫分量T1,long计算值55.88 s（实验值41.39 s），误差因子1.4；短弛豫分量T1,short计算偏差因子66；光学跃迁^5D0→^7F0计算误差1.1%；鉴定出332 cm⁻¹的dpphen摆动模和180.57 cm⁻¹的硝酸根摆动模为主要耦合通道；四极不对称参数η=0.941接近最大值。
AI.conclusion: 单分子气相模型足以描述慢弛豫通道，分子内振动耦合是主导机制；短弛豫通道需要考虑晶体和分子间效应。基于振动分析，提出配体刚化和取代策略可有效抑制退相干，为分子自旋量子比特的设计提供了理论依据。

title: Comment on "Entropic Costs of Extracting Classical Ticks from a Quantum Clock"
comment: Comment on arXiv:2502.00096 (published journal version at https://doi.org/10.1103/5rtj-djfk)
summary: A recent Letter by Wadhia et al. reports a realization of a quantum clock using a double quantum dot (DQD) [Phys. Rev. Lett. 135, 200407 (2005)]. This Comment identifies two fundamental issues: (I) the claimed ``quantum clock" exhibits only classical behavior and lacks intrinsic temporal correlations between ticks; it is not sufficient for accurate time as a good clock. (II) the thermodynamic analysis misassigns entropy production and conflates amplification with measurement; the reported combined entropy is an engineering dissipation, not a fundamental cost of quantum timekeeping.

AI.tldr: 本文对Wadhia等人宣称的“量子时钟”提出质疑，指出其仅表现出经典行为且缺乏时间关联性，同时热力学分析存在熵产生误分配的问题。
AI.motivation: 纠正Wadhia等人在量子时钟实现与热力学分析中的概念错误，澄清量子时间测量的本质要求。
AI.method: 通过两个核心论点进行反驳：（I）分析该“量子时钟”缺乏量子时间关联性，仅具备经典行为；（II）指出热力学分析中熵产生的归属错误，混淆了放大过程与测量过程。
AI.result: 证明该工作未实现真正的量子时钟，其熵分析反映的是工程耗散而非量子计时的基本代价。
AI.conclusion: 该“量子时钟”不满足精准计时的条件，热力学结论需重新审视。

title: Chiral superconductors from parent states with non-uniform Berry curvature: Momentum-space vortices, BdG topology, and thermal Hall conductivity
summary: We investigate chiral superconductivity emerging from parent electronic states with non-uniform Berry curvature, motivated by recent experiments in rhombohedral graphene multilayers. Using the continuum $λ_N$-model-a tunable platform with independently controllable Berry curvature profiles-we solve the full BCS gap equation on a continuum Chern band beyond the weak-coupling limit. We find that a non-uniform Berry curvature of the parent band enriches the superconducting order parameter, leading to the formation of momentum-space vortices in the gap function away from high-symmetry points. By tuning the Berry curvature profile, we identify distinct regimes associated with vortex nucleation and vortex number saturation, and show that the nucleation of momentum-space vortices tends to lower the condensation energy. We then show analytically that the parent band Chern number constrains the number of momentum-space vortices that can nucleate in the gap-independent of details of the $λ_N$-model. We also provide a gauge-invariant formulation for computing the Bogoliubov-de Gennes (BdG) Berry curvature for continuum models, and find that it is determined by a momentum-space phase current. The winding of this current around vortices in the occupied region in turn determines the BdG Chern number. Finally, we discuss how thermal Hall measurements can be used to probe the formation of momentum-space vortices. Our results highlight the crucial role of Berry curvature in shaping chiral superconductivity, and offer guiding principles for its identification in systems such as rhombohedral graphene.

AI.tldr: 本文研究从具有非均匀 Berry 曲率的母体电子态中涌现的手征超导性，通过连续 λ_N 模型求解完整 BCS 能隙方程，发现非均匀 Berry 曲率会诱导动量空间涡旋出现在超导能隙函数中，并受母带 Chern 数约束，最后讨论了热霍尔测量作为探测手段。
AI.motivation: 受菱方多层石墨烯实验启发，探索非均匀 Berry 曲率如何影响手征超导性，并建立一般性理论框架。
AI.method: 采用连续 λ_N 模型（可独立调控 Berry 曲率分布），在连续 Chern 带上求解完整 BCS 能隙方程（超越弱耦合极限），并结合解析分析论证 Chern 数对动量空间涡旋数目的约束，以及构建规范不变的 BdG Berry 曲率计算方法。
AI.result: 非均匀 Berry 曲率使能隙函数在动量空间中形成涡旋；存在涡旋成核与数目饱和的不同区间；涡旋成核会降低凝聚能；母带 Chern 数严格约束涡旋数目上限；BdG Berry 曲率由动量空间相位流决定，后者围绕涡旋的缠绕给出 BdG Chern 数。
AI.conclusion: Berry 曲率在手征超导性中起关键作用，热霍尔测量可用于实验探测动量空间涡旋的形成，为菱方石墨烯等体系中的手征超导识别提供了指导原则。

title: Conductivity of a Non-Galilean--Invariant Fermi Liquid: Exact Solution of the Kinetic Equation
summary:
We obtain an exact expression for the conductivity of a disordered,
  non-Galilean-invariant Fermi liquid by solving the kinetic equation with both screened Coulomb and $z=3$ Pomeranchuk critical interactions. While consistent with previous asymptotic results, our solution shows that electron-electron interactions enter the conductivity solely via the quasiparticle scattering time, $τ_\mathrm{ee}$. Accordingly, the crossovers between the collisionless and hydrodynamic regimes occur when $1/τ_\mathrm{ee}$ becomes comparable to the larger of the impurity scattering rate and the probe frequency, $Ω$. In addition, the exact solution yields the optical response in the hydrodynamic regime, $Ω\ll 1/τ_\mathrm{ee}$, which is inaccessible within perturbation theory. Near a $z=3$ Pomeranchuk quantum critical point, consistency between the kinetic-equation and Kubo approaches requires proper inclusion of mass renormalization within the Eliashberg approximation, which also ensures that the crossover between the collisionless and hydrodynamic regimes in the optical conductivity occurs at the Planckian scale $Ω\sim T$.

AI.tldr: 本文通过求解包含屏蔽库仑和z=3 Pomeranchuk临界相互作用的动力学方程，获得了无序非伽利略不变费米液体电导率的精确表达式。研究发现电子-电子相互作用仅通过准粒子散射时间τ_ee影响电导率，碰撞区与流体动力学区之间的转变发生在1/τ_ee与杂质散射率和探测频率Ω中较大者相当的时候。在z=3 Pomeranchuk量子临界点附近，动力学方程与Kubo方法的一致性要求正确包含Eliashberg近似下的质量重整化，这确保了光学电导率中碰撞区与流体动力学区之间的转变发生在普朗克尺度Ω~T上。
AI.motivation: 获得无序非伽利略不变费米液体电导率的精确表达式，并解决动力学方程与Kubo方法在量子临界点附近的一致性问题和流体动力学区域光学响应的可及性问题。
AI.method: 通过求解包含屏蔽库仑相互作用和z=3 Pomeranchuk临界相互作用的动力学方程，并在z=3 Pomeranchuk量子临界点附近采用Eliashberg近似正确包含质量重整化。
AI.result: 获得了电导率的精确表达式，证明了电子-电子相互作用仅通过τ_ee影响电导率；确定了碰撞区与流体动力学区的交叉条件；获得了流体动力学区的光学响应（这在微扰论中无法获得）；证明了在临界点附近动力学方程与Kubo方法的一致性需要包含质量重整化。
AI.conclusion: 本文的精确解统一了之前渐近结果，扩展了可计算的区域到流体动力学区，并揭示了量子临界点附近理论一致性条件，即光学电导率中碰撞-流体动力学转变发生在普朗克尺度Ω~T上。

title: A path-finding algorithm for computing minimal-weight-matching centrosymmetry parameter
summary: In 2020, Peter Larsen reported flaws in the methods for centrosymmetry parameter computation in the existing molecular dynamics and analysis packages. He proposed an intuitive an mathematically rigorous formulation for centrosymmetry parameter in terms of minimal-weight matching (MWM) on a fully-connected graph of atomic neighbors. He proposed using Edmonds' blossom algorithm for computing such a matching. In this paper, we investigate an alternative algorithm for MWM CSP computation using path finding approach and A* algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用A*算法和路径查找方法替代Edmonds' blossom算法，用于计算中心对称参数（CSP）的最小权匹配。
AI.motivation: Peter Larsen在2020年指出现有分子动力学软件中中心对称参数计算方法存在缺陷，并提出了基于最小权匹配的严格数学公式，但使用Edmonds' blossom算法。本文旨在探索更高效的计算替代方案。
AI.method: 采用路径查找方法和A*算法来实现最小权匹配的中心对称参数计算，作为Edmonds' blossom算法的替代方案。
AI.result: 目前摘要未提供具体的实验结果或性能对比数据。
AI.conclusion: 提出了另一种计算CSP的算法思路，为相关计算提供了新的选择。

title: Benchmarking machine-learned interatomic potentials for molecular infrared spectroscopy
summary: Machine learning has transformed the field of atomistic simulations by enabling the development of interatomic potentials that are computationally efficient and highly accurate. These advances have opened the door to modeling molecular vibrations and predicting infrared spectra with near ab-initio accuracy at a fraction of the computational cost. Among these approaches, message-passing neural networks (MPNNs) have emerged as a particularly powerful class of models for representing complex atomic interactions. In this study, we benchmark five MPNN architectures, SchNet, FieldSchNet, SO3Net, PaiNN, and MACE, for predicting infrared spectra of small organic molecules. SchNet and FieldSchNet are invariant models, while SO3Net, PaiNN, and MACE are equivariant, explicitly accounting for rotational symmetries in molecular representations. We evaluate their performance in terms of computational efficiency, accuracy, and robustness. All models accurately predict properties, such as energies, forces, and dipole moments, required for infrared spectra calculations. They also capture harmonic frequencies and infrared spectra derived from molecular dynamics with high fidelity for molecules in the training set. However, SchNet and FieldSchNet show limited transferability to unseen systems, while SO3Net, PaiNN, and MACE generalize more effectively. In terms of computational efficiency, SchNet is the most efficient and FieldSchNet enables field-dependent response modeling but with higher cost. PaiNN achieves the best balance between accuracy and efficiency, MACE provides the highest spectral accuracy and transferability, and SO3Net performs between PaiNN and MACE.

AI.tldr: 本文对比了五种消息传递神经网络（MPNN）在预测小有机分子红外光谱方面的表现。其中SchNet和FieldSchNet为不变模型，SO3Net、PaiNN和MACE为等变模型。所有模型在训练集分子上都能准确预测能量、力和偶极矩等关键属性，但在未见过系统上，等变模型（SO3Net、PaiNN、MACE）的泛化能力优于不变模型（SchNet、FieldSchNet）。综合来看，SchNet计算效率最高，PaiNN在精度与效率间取得最佳平衡，MACE精度和迁移性最优，SO3Net介于两者之间。
AI.motivation: 消息传递神经网络在原子模拟中表现优异，但不同MPNN架构在预测红外光谱时的性能差异尚缺乏系统性对比，特别是对不变模型与等变模型的泛化能力和计算效率缺乏基准评估。
AI.method: 选取五种MPNN架构（SchNet、FieldSchNet、SO3Net、PaiNN、MACE），在小有机分子数据集上从计算效率、预测精度和鲁棒性三个维度进行系统基准测试，评估各模型在能量、力、偶极矩以及红外光谱（含谐波频率和分子动力学衍生光谱）上的表现。
AI.result: 所有模型在训练集分子上均能准确预测红外光谱所需属性；在未见系统上，等变模型（SO3Net、PaiNN、MACE）泛化能力显著优于不变模型（SchNet、FieldSchNet）。计算效率上SchNet最高，FieldSchNet支持场依赖建模但成本更高；综合表现上PaiNN平衡最佳，MACE精度和迁移性最高，SO3Net居中。
AI.conclusion: 等变MPNN架构在红外光谱预测中具有更好的泛化能力，适用于更广泛的分子体系；PaiNN是实际应用中精度与效率的最佳权衡选择，MACE适合对精度和迁移性要求最高的场景。

title: Thermodynamic Irreversibility of Training Algorithms
summary: The training algorithms for AI systems all introduce far-from-equilibrium dynamical processes, and understanding the irreversibility of these algorithms is a fundamental step towards understanding the learning dynamics of modern AI systems. In this work, we establish a general framework for defining and analyzing the irreversibility of training algorithms. We show that four different ways to characterize the irreversibility of dynamical processes are equivalent to leading order in the step size $η$: numerical backward error $φ_{\rm DE}$, time-renormalized correction $φ_{\rm TR}$, microscopic time reversal asymmetry $φ_{\rm TA}$, and the (regularized) stochastic-thermodynamic entropy production $φ_{\rm ST}$. The irreversibility gives rise to a time-reversal-symmetry-breaking emergent force that generically breaks non-isometric continuous reparametrization symmetries, preserves orthogonal symmetries, and leads to a universal preference for those learning trajectories that minimize the entropy production rate.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了训练算法不可逆性的通用框架，证明四种不可逆性表征方法在步长η的一阶近似下等价，并揭示不可逆性产生的时间反演对称性破缺力会打破非等距连续重参数化对称性，同时偏好最小化熵产生率的学习轨迹。
AI.motivation: AI系统的训练算法都是远离平衡态的非可逆动力过程，理解其不可逆性是理解现代AI学习动力学的基础。
AI.method: 建立了通用框架，从四个角度（数值后向误差、时间重归一化修正、微观时间反演不对称性、随机热力学熵产生）分析和定义训练算法的不可逆性，并证明它们在步长η的一阶近似下等价。
AI.result: 四种不可逆性表征方式在η一阶近似下等价；不可逆性产生一种时间反演对称性破缺的涌现力，该力打破非等距连续重参数化对称性，保留正交对称性，并引导系统偏好最小化熵产生率的学习轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 训练算法的不可逆性有普适的数学结构，它通过对称性破缺和熵产生最小化原则影响学习动力学轨迹的选择。

title: Quantifying the coupling between strain and cation valence in high entropy oxide thin films using electron microscopy
summary: High entropy oxides (HEOs) are a class of materials with vast compositional space and tunable properties, making them attractive for applications in thermoelectrics, magnetism, ionic conduction, and beyond. However, their metastable nature makes the local structure, and consequently their properties, highly sensitive to growth conditions. It is therefore essential to probe the local modulations in atomic, chemical, and electronic structure as a function of growth conditions. Here, advanced S/TEM techniques, including 4D-STEM combined with electron energy loss spectroscopy and energy-dispersive X-ray spectroscopy are used to investigate the effect of substrate temperature on structure and strain at the nanoscale regime in HEO thin films. We quantify how nanoscale strain variations correlate with Co valence and subtle chemical differences in the films with the same nominal composition but different growth temperatures. Our results demonstrate that identical HEO compositions can accommodate distinct strain and defect states in thin film form and highlight how synthesis conditions can be leveraged to manipulate strain and Co valence. These findings establish a framework to tailor functional properties via strain and valence control in high entropy oxide thin films.

AI.tldr: 本文利用先进扫描透射电子显微镜技术（4D-STEM、EELS、EDS）研究高熵氧化物薄膜中基底温度对纳米尺度结构和应变的影响，发现相同成分的薄膜可通过不同生长温度调控应变和Co价态，从而建立通过应变和价态控制来定制功能性质的框架。
AI.motivation: 高熵氧化物因其成分空间大、性质可调而具有广泛应用前景，但其亚稳态特性使得局部结构对生长条件高度敏感，因此需要探究生长条件对原子、化学和电子结构局部调制的影响。
AI.method: 采用先进的S/TEM技术，包括4D-STEM、电子能量损失谱（EELS）和能量色散X射线光谱（EDS），系统研究不同基底温度下高熵氧化物薄膜的纳米尺度结构和应变变化。
AI.result: 定量揭示了纳米尺度应变变化与Co价态及细微化学差异之间的关联；证明了相同名义成分的HEO薄膜可容纳不同的应变和缺陷状态；阐明了合成条件可用于调控应变和Co价态。
AI.conclusion: 建立了通过应变和价态控制来定制高熵氧化物薄膜功能性质的框架，强调了生长条件对亚稳态HEO材料性质的关键调控作用。

title: Spin torque driven mode hybridization and band engineering in nanopatterned magnonic crystals
summary: Spin wave propagation and dynamic control are essential for reconfigurable magnonic and spintronic devices. Here, tunable mode coupling and band hybridisation are demonstrated in a nanopatterned bicomponent magnonic crystal consisting of a Permalloy/heavy metal bilayer patterned with a two dimensional array of Co nanodots. Using the plane wave method and the linearised Landau Lifshitz equation with a field like torque term, we show that inhomogeneous current induced spin torque produces periodic modulation of the magnonic frequency, enabling dynamic control of spin-wave dispersion. A pronounced avoided crossing between localised and propagating Damon Eshbach modes is observed, leading to tunable hybridisation gaps, band deformation, and enhanced mode mixing. The spin torque induced modulation enables controlled mode conversion and reconfigurable hybrid magnonic states, demonstrating efficient electrical tuning of nanoscale spin-wave dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了在由坡莫合金/重金属双层膜和钴纳米点阵列构成的纳米图案双组分磁性晶体中，通过非均匀电流诱导的自旋力矩实现自旋波模式耦合与能带杂化的动态调控，观测到局域模与传播Damon-Eshbach模之间的可调避免交叉，形成可重构的混合磁振子态。
AI.motivation: 自旋波传播与动态控制是可重构磁振子及自旋电子器件的关键，但如何实现高效、可调的电学调控仍是一大挑战。
AI.method: 采用平面波方法和含场力矩项的线性化Landau-Lifshitz方程，理论分析非均匀电流诱导自旋力矩对磁振子频率的周期性调制作用。
AI.result: 观察到局域模与传播Damon-Eshbach模之间的显著避免交叉，实现了可调的杂化能隙、能带形变及增强的模式混合。
AI.conclusion: 自旋力矩诱导的调制可实现可控模式转换和可重构混合磁振子态，证明了纳米尺度自旋波动力学的有效电学调谐能力。

title: Robust fluctuating intertwined charge stripes in the Emery model
summary: The single-band Hubbard model is one of the most extensively studied models in condensed matter physics, giving rise to intertwined spin and charge stripes that coexist with, or lie in the vicinity of, superconductivity in the phase diagram. However, whether the low energy physics of the single-band Hubbard model is fully equivalent to the multi-band (multi-orbital) Emery model remains an unsettled question. While the intertwined stripes and nematicity have been studied in the single-band Hubbard model, a comprehensive picture in the Emery model is lacking. In this paper, we focus on the less investigated intertwined charge stripes using complementary density matrix renormalization group (DMRG) and determinant quantum Monte Carlo (DQMC) techniques. Our ground state DMRG confirms the presence of the oxygen-centered charge stripes at a reduced amplitude in the Emery model parameter regime widely used in the study of intertwined stripes. Close analysis of the oxygen orbital structure of the static charge correlation function from DQMC reveals the charge stripe pattern in real-space, showcasing stronger charge density modulation on $p$-orbitals pointing along ``the rivers of charge'', consistent with DMRG. For the parameter set with the largest fermion signs, we managed to reach a temperature where the system first demonstrated tendencies to form purely unidirectional spin and charge stripes, and the $B_{1g}$ component becomes dominant in the bond-charge nematic susceptibility. This observation correlates with the doping dependence of the kinetic energy anisotropy, suggesting a close relation between the nematicity and charge stripes in the Emery model.

AI.tldr: 本文通过DMRG和DQMC方法研究Emery模型中的电荷条纹，发现氧中心电荷条纹的存在，并揭示了向列性与电荷条纹之间的紧密关联。
AI.motivation: 单带Hubbard模型与多带Emery模型在低能物理上是否等价的问题尚未解决，且Emery模型中交织条纹和向列性的全面图像尚不完整。
AI.method: 使用互补的密度矩阵重正化群（DMRG）和行列式量子蒙特卡洛（DQMC）技术，分析Emery模型中的电荷条纹结构。
AI.result: DMRG确认了氧中心电荷条纹的存在但振幅减弱；DQMC揭示了p轨道上更强的电荷密度调制；在费米子符号最大的参数下，观察到纯单向自旋和电荷条纹，且B1g分量在键电荷向列性磁化率中占主导。
AI.conclusion: 向列性与电荷条纹在Emery模型中存在密切关系，为理解高温超导中的电子有序现象提供了新视角。

title: Tunneling spectra of $\mathrm{TaO}_x$ junctions for van der Waals superconductors
summary: Tunneling spectroscopy and its evolution are crucial for elucidating the intricate electronic structure and emergent phenomena in quantum materials.Nevertheless, high-quality measurements -- specifically those tracking evolution across temperature and external fields -- remain a formidable challenge. We have fabricated a high-quality $\mathrm{TaO}_x$-based planar tunneling junction by using magnetron sputtering for van der Waals (vdW) superconductors. Using the vdW superconductor $\mathrm{Bi}_2\mathrm{Sr}_2\mathrm{CaCu}_2\mathrm{O}_{8+δ}$ (Bi2212) as a benchmark, this platform yields high-quality tunneling spectra, reproducing the electronic signatures obtained from scanning tunneling spectra acquired from atomically clean surfaces under ultra-high vacuum conditions. This architecture enables high-precision spectroscopy across extensive temperature and magnetic field ranges, offering a universal strategy for probing the electronic structures of diverse two-dimensional systems and facilitating future explorations of material properties.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种基于TaOₓ的高质量平面隧道结，可用于范德瓦尔斯超导体的隧道谱测量。以Bi₂Sr₂CaCu₂O₈₊δ（Bi2212）为基准，该平台能在宽温度与磁场范围内获得高精度隧道谱，媲美超高真空下的扫描隧道谱，为二维体系电子结构研究提供了通用方案。
AI.motivation: 高质量的隧道谱测量（尤其是追踪温度和外场演化）极具挑战性，现有技术难以兼顾高质量信号与宽范围可调性。
AI.method: 利用磁控溅射制备TaOₓ基平面隧道结，将其应用于范德瓦尔斯超导体，并以Bi2212为基准验证性能。
AI.result: 该平台获得的隧道谱质量高，复现了原子级清洁表面在超高真空下的扫描隧道谱特征，且能在宽温度与磁场范围内进行高精度测量。
AI.conclusion: 该架构为探测二维体系电子结构提供了通用策略，有助于推动量子材料物性的进一步探索。

title: Effect of Pb Substitution at the Mo site on the Magnetic Properties of the Polar Magnet Fe$_2$Mo$_3$O$_8$
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures, accepted by IEEE Transactions on Magnetics
summary: The ternary transition-metal oxide Fe$_2$Mo$_3$O$_8$ is a polar magnet characterized by a layered structure of magnetic Fe honeycomb lattices and non-magnetic Mo kagome lattices. Whereas previous studies have primarily focused on the chemical substitution at the Fe sites to modulate the magnetic properties, the Mo sites have remained largely unexplored due to the strong spin-singlet trimerization of Mo$^{4+}$ ions. In this study, we investigated the effect of substituting non-magnetic Pb$^{4+}$ and Zr$^{4+}$ ions into the Mo sites to intentionally disrupt the Mo trimers. Our results reveal that the disruption of the Mo spin-singlet state induces active spins within the Mo layer, resulting in the emergence of a ferromagnetic-like behavior that persists even at room temperature. Quantitative analysis that takes into account the weight fraction of the main phase suggests an effective spin $S = 1/2$ state per active Mo ion upon trimer disruption. These findings demonstrate that controlling non-magnetic cluster states within a polar host via chemical substitution is a promising approach for designing room-temperature magnetoelectric materials.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在极性磁体Fe₂Mo₃O₈中用Pb⁴⁺和Zr⁴⁺替代Mo位点破坏Mo自旋单重态三聚体，从而在室温下诱导出铁磁-like行为的现象。
AI.motivation: 以往研究主要关注Fe位的化学替代来调控磁性，而Mo位因强自旋单重态三聚化而未被充分探索。本文旨在通过破坏Mo三聚体来引入新的磁性行为。
AI.method: 在Fe₂Mo₃O₈的Mo位点引入非磁性的Pb⁴⁺和Zr⁴⁺离子，破坏Mo三聚体，并通过定量分析评估主相质量分数下的有效自旋态。
AI.result: 破坏Mo自旋单重态后，Mo层内产生了活性自旋，呈现出室温下仍存在的铁磁-like行为。每个被破坏的Mo离子对应有效自旋S=1/2态。
AI.conclusion: 通过化学替代控制极性宿主中的非磁性簇态，是设计室温多铁材料的一种有前景的策略。

title: Diagrammatic Monte Carlo for Fermionic Rényi Entanglement Entropy
summary: We develop a direct diagrammatic Monte Carlo framework for the Renyi entanglement entropy of interacting lattice fermions. The method starts from the fermionic graded-swap representation of Z_n[A]=Tr_Aρ_A^n, which converts the entropy problem into a replicated path integral with mixed temporal boundary conditions on the entangling region. In this representation the replica momenta are half-shifted, q_m=(2m+1)π/n, and the interaction expansion has a determinant form suitable for connected-determinant summation. We combine this expansion with a many-configuration Markov-chain Monte Carlo sampler to obtain order-by-order corrections for very large systems to very high orders. As a benchmark, we compare the order-by-order coefficients of a 3*3 Hubbard cluster with exact diagonalization. We then report a production calculation for a large periodic lattice with a square subregions. The dominant system-size limitation is therefore memory rather than a conventional auxiliary-field sign problem. The results provide a step toward diagrammatic calculations of fermionic entanglement observables in regimes where direct quantum Monte Carlo sampling is costly or sign-problem limited.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种用于相互作用晶格费米子Renyi纠缠熵的直接图解蒙特卡洛框架。该方法基于费米子分级交换表示，将熵问题转化为具有混合时间边界条件的复制路径积分，并结合多组态马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛采样器，实现了极大规模系统的高阶逐阶修正计算。
AI.motivation: 传统量子蒙特卡洛方法在处理费米子纠缠熵时面临符号问题或计算成本过高的问题，需要发展新的计算方法来克服这些限制。
AI.method: 1) 从费米子分级交换表示Z_n[A]=Tr_Aρ_A^n出发，将熵问题转化为带混合时间边界条件的复制路径积分；2) 复制动量采用半移位形式q_m=(2m+1)π/n；3) 相互作用展开具有行列式形式，适用于连接行列式求和；4) 结合多组态马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛采样器进行逐阶修正计算。
AI.result: 1) 在3×3 Hubbard团簇上进行了基准测试，逐阶系数与精确对角化结果一致；2) 在具有方形子区域的大型周期晶格上进行了生产计算；3) 主要系统尺寸限制来自内存而非传统的辅助场符号问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在直接量子蒙特卡洛采样成本高或受符号问题限制的区域内计算费米子纠缠可观测量提供了新途径。

title: Dynamic electron correlation energy for multireference wavefunction methods from one- and two-electron reduced density matrices
summary: Efficiently recovering dynamic correlation in strongly correlated systems without incurring prohibitive computational costs remains a central challenge in quantum chemistry. In this Perspective, we review and benchmark methods capable of recovering dynamic correlation for multireference wave functions exclusively from low-order reduced density matrices and densities. These approaches require at most the two-electron reduced density matrix of the reference wave function and fall into two categories: density functional theory (DFT)-based methods and purely ab initio multireference adiabatic connection (AC) methods. The former include MC-srDFT, which recovers dynamic correlation through a short-range exchange-correlation functional depending on the charge and spin densities, as well as MC-PDFT and MC-srPDFT, which employ translated functionals that additionally depend on the on-top pair density. Within the post-CASSCF framework, we perform a direct, head-to-head benchmark of these approaches under identical computational settings (including active spaces and basis sets) against challenging multireference problems, including singlet-triplet gaps in organic biradicals, excitation energies, and spin-state splittings in iron complexes. Among the DFT-based methods, MC-srPDFT emerges as the most accurate, underscoring the benefit of incorporating the on-top pair density. However, all considered DFT-based methods fail to provide reliable spin-state energetics for transition-metal complexes. Conversely, linearized AC0 rivals or outperforms more computationally expensive second-order perturbation theory approaches across all benchmark sets. We discuss these findings in the context of alternative formulations and existing literature, highlighting critical limitations and identifying promising directions for the future development of scalable multireference methods.

AI.tldr: 本文综述并基准测试了仅需低阶约化密度矩阵即可恢复多参考波函数动态关联的方法，包括基于DFT的方法（如MC-srDFT、MC-PDFT、MC-srPDFT）和纯从头算多参考绝热连接方法（AC0）。结果表明，MC-srPDFT在DFT方法中精度最高，但所有DFT方法在过渡金属配合物自旋态能量上均表现不佳；而线性化AC0在所有基准测试中优于或媲美昂贵的二阶微扰理论方法。
AI.motivation: 高效恢复强关联系统中的动态关联而不产生过高计算成本是量子化学的核心挑战。现有方法（如CASPT2、NEVPT2）虽然精确但计算昂贵，而仅需低阶约化密度矩阵的方法有望在保持精度的同时大幅降低计算成本。
AI.method: 本文在相同的计算设置（活性空间、基组）下，对基于DFT的方法（MC-srDFT、MC-PDFT、MC-srPDFT）和绝热连接方法（AC0）进行了直接头对头基准测试，测试对象包括有机双自由基的单-三重态能隙、激发能以及铁配合物的自旋态分裂等具有挑战性的多参考问题。
AI.result: 1) 基于DFT的方法中，MC-srPDFT精度最高，表明引入on-top对密度有益；2) 所有DFT方法在过渡金属配合物的自旋态能量上均不可靠；3) 线性化AC0在所有基准测试中优于或媲美二阶微扰理论方法。
AI.conclusion: AC0方法在精度与成本之间取得了出色平衡，是极具前景的可扩展多参考方法发展方向。而DFT-based方法在涉及过渡金属时存在根本性局限，需要进一步改进。

title: Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless-type Transition in Site Percolation on the Diamond Hierarchical Lattice
summary: We study site percolation on the diamond hierarchical lattice, a finite-dimensional fractal network, using an exact generating-function analysis. In contrast to bond percolation, site percolation on this lattice does not undergo a transition from a nonpercolating phase to a percolating phase. Instead, the system exhibits a nonpercolating phase for $p<p_{\rm c}$ and a critical phase for $p>p_{\rm c}$. In the critical phase, the size of the largest cluster remains subextensive, scaling as $N^{ψ(p)}$, where the fractal exponent $ψ(p)$ varies continuously with $p$. By analyzing the renormalization-group recursion relation in the vicinity of $p_{\rm c}$, we show that the correlation length exhibits a Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless-type essential singularity, $ξ(p)\sim \exp \left({\rm const}/\sqrt{p_{\rm c}-p}\right)$ for $p \to p_{\rm c}^-$, which is further confirmed by finite-size scaling analyses showing excellent data collapse. These results demonstrate that critical phases in percolation can emerge even on finite-dimensional networks and that exponential volume growth is not necessary for such phases to appear. We argue that the critical phase on the diamond hierarchical lattice stems from site dilution remaining relevant under renormalization.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了金刚石层级晶格上的位点逾渗，发现系统存在一个非逾渗相和一个临界相，临界相中最大簇大小以次广延方式标度，且关联长度表现出BKT型本质奇异性。这表明临界相可以在有限维网络中涌现，无需指数级体积增长。
AI.motivation: 传统逾渗理论通常认为有限维系统中只存在从非逾渗相到逾渗相的转变，临界相只在无限维或指数增长网络中发生。本文试图探索有限维分形网络上是否也能出现临界相。
AI.method: 采用精确生成函数分析研究金刚石层级晶格上的位点逾渗，结合重整化群递归关系分析临界点附近的标度行为，并通过有限尺寸标度验证数据塌缩。
AI.result: 系统在p<p_c时为非逾渗相，p>p_c时为临界相。临界相中最大簇尺寸标度为N^{ψ(p)}，其中ψ(p)连续变化。关联长度在p→p_c^-时表现出BKT型本质奇异性：ξ(p)~exp(const/√(p_c-p))。
AI.conclusion: 证明了临界相可以在有限维网络中涌现，且无需指数级体积增长。临界相的出现源于位点稀释在重整化下保持相关。

title: Backward Mapping from Device Targets to Chemical Genomes for Interpretable Discovery of Phase-Stable Lead-Free Double Perovskites with DFT-Validated Design Rules
summary: Lead-free halide double perovskites are promising alternatives to Pb-based semiconductors, but their discovery is challenging because structural formability, thermodynamic stability, band-gap placement, optical-transition strength, dielectric screening, and carrier transport must all be satisfied within the vast A2BB'X6 space. We present a backward-mapping, genome-guided framework linking device-level targets to chemically interpretable descriptor families for Pb-free double-perovskite discovery. From 13,088 charge-balanced compositions, we apply a halide-aware workflow integrating geometric formability filtering, six-family chemical-genome descriptor encoding, evolutionary-optimized machine learning surrogates, SHAP-based interpretation, and DFT phenotype closure. Stability is modeled using Ehull-derived labels, while a band-gap surrogate predicts scalar-relativistic PBE Eg for target-driven selection. The funnel reduces the search space to seven DFT-validated candidates: K2BePdF6, K2MnCdCl6, Rb2TeCuBr6, Cs2SnGeBr6, Cs2GeSrBr6, Cs2NiBaI6, and Cs2AgInCl6, all verified for structural assignability, band-edge character, effective masses, dielectric response, optical absorption, conductivity, reflectivity, energy-loss spectra, and XRD fingerprints. Functional rules emerge from stability-function coupling rather than band-gap optimization alone, providing an interpretable inverse-design paradigm to accelerate Pb-free double-perovskite discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个反向映射、基因组引导的框架，用于无铅双钙钛矿材料的发现。该框架通过几何成形性筛选、六族化学基因组描述符编码、进化优化机器学习代理、SHAP解释和DFT验证，从13,088种电荷平衡组合中筛选出7种DFT验证的候选材料，为无铅双钙钛矿的逆向设计提供了可解释的范式。
AI.motivation: 无铅卤化物双钙钛矿是铅基半导体的有前景替代品，但其发现极具挑战性，因为需要在庞大的A2BB'X6空间中同时满足结构可成形性、热力学稳定性、带隙位置、光学跃迁强度、介电屏蔽和载流子传输等多个条件。
AI.method: 采用反向映射、基因组引导框架，结合卤素感知工作流：几何成形性过滤、六族化学基因组描述符编码、进化优化机器学习代理、SHAP解释和DFT验证。稳定性使用Ehull衍生标签建模，带隙代理预测标量相对论PBE Eg进行目标导向选择。
AI.result: 从13,088种电荷平衡组合中筛选出7种DFT验证的候选材料：K2BePdF6、K2MnCdCl6、Rb2TeCuBr6、Cs2SnGeBr6、Cs2GeSrBr6、Cs2NiBaI6和Cs2AgInCl6，所有候选材料均经过结构可分配性、能带边缘特征、有效质量、介电响应、光学吸收、电导率、反射率、能量损失谱和XRD指纹的验证。
AI.conclusion: 稳定性-功能耦合而非单纯的带隙优化衍生出功能规则，为加速无铅双钙钛矿发现提供了可解释的逆向设计范式。

title: Nonlinear Photonic Tripartite Phase
summary: Anderson localization is usually understood as a transition between extended and localized phases, with criticality confined to a single mobility edge. Recent advances predict that quasiperiodic systems can instead host a finite critical window bounded by mobility edges, in which localized, critical and extended states coexist. Yet both the experimental realization of this regime and whether interactions can provide controlled access to it remain unknown. Here, we realize such a tripartite phase in a nonlinear quasiperiodic photonic lattice and show that Kerr nonlinearity, acting as an effective interaction, enables state-selective access to the critical window. By tracking wavepacket dynamics, we distinguish localized, critical and extended transport regimes and uncover a state-selective response: rather than simply reinforcing localization through self-trapping, weak nonlinearity drives low-energy localized states into the critical window, whereas stronger nonlinearity restores localization. By contrast, critical, extended and high-energy localized states evolve monotonically towards self-trapped behaviour. Our results reveal a state-selective mechanism by which interactions provide controlled access to a pre-existing critical window in quasiperiodic systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文在非线性准周期光子晶格中实现了局域态、临界态和扩展态共存的三相临界窗口，并展示了Kerr非线性作为有效相互作用如何提供状态选择性调控，使低能局域态进入临界窗口。
AI.motivation: 准周期系统中理论上存在有限临界窗口，其中局域态、临界态和扩展态共存，但该区域的实验实现以及相互作用能否提供可控接入途径尚不清楚。
AI.method: 在非线性准周期光子晶格中利用Kerr非线性作为有效相互作用，通过追踪波包动力学区分局域、临界和扩展输运区域，并观察不同状态对非线性的响应行为。
AI.result: 弱非线性驱动低能局域态进入临界窗口，而强非线性则恢复局域化；临界态、扩展态和高能局域态单调地向自陷行为演化。发现了状态选择性响应机制。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了相互作用通过状态选择性机制提供对准周期系统中预存临界窗口的可控接入，拓展了对安德森局域化及其非线性调控的理解。

title: Large-flavor route to a stable U(1) Dirac spin liquid on the maple-leaf lattice
summary: The $\mathrm{U}(1)$ Dirac spin liquid provides a useful organizing framework for frustrated magnets: it offers an algebraic parent state from which competing orders, confinement patterns, and low-energy spectral features can be understood. Whether such a state can occur as a stable ground state of a two-dimensional spin Hamiltonian remains an open question, because monopole events of the compact gauge field can proliferate and confine the spinons. Here, we show that the maple-leaf lattice provides a distinct route to this problem. Its Dirac spin liquid realizes QED$_3$ with $N_f=12$ Dirac fermions, substantially more than the $N_f=4$ theories of the triangular and kagome lattices. We classify the fundamental monopoles under the full microscopic symmetry group and find five charge-one spin-singlet monopoles that are trivial under lattice symmetries, time reversal, and spin rotation. The phase is therefore not protected by symmetry in the usual sense: its stability depends on whether these allowed monopoles are dynamically irrelevant. Available large-$N_f$ and Monte Carlo estimates place the charge-one monopole dimension close to the relevance threshold in $(2+1)$ dimensions, making the maple-leaf lattice a concrete large-flavor platform for testing the stability of compact QED$_3$ in a quantum magnet. The same monopole classification gives direct numerical predictions, identifying the symmetry sectors in which singlet, triplet, and quintet monopole excitations should appear. This provides a route to testing the $N_f=12$ Dirac spin liquid through symmetry-resolved exact diagonalization and variational studies of maple-leaf spin Hamiltonians.

AI.tldr: 本文研究枫叶晶格上的U(1)狄拉克自旋液体，发现其具有N_f=12的QED₃理论（远多于三角/蜂窝晶格的N_f=4），并分类了基本磁单极子。尽管存在5个对称性允许的电荷-1自旋单态单极子，但大N_f和Monte Carlo估算显示其维度接近临界阈值，使枫叶晶格成为检验紧致QED₃稳定性的重要平台。
AI.motivation: U(1)狄拉克自旋液体是否能在二维自旋哈密顿量中作为稳定基态存在是一个悬而未决的问题，关键在于紧致规范场的磁单极子事件可能导致自旋子禁闭。作者希望寻找一个具有足够大费米子味道数N_f的平台来检验QED₃的稳定性。
AI.method: 利用枫叶晶格实现N_f=12的狄拉克自旋液体，在完整微观对称性群下对基本磁单极子进行分类，结合大N_f展开和Monte Carlo估计分析单极子算符的标度维度。
AI.result: 发现了5个在晶格对称性、时间反演和自旋旋转下均平凡的电荷-1自旋单态磁单极子；这些单极子的标度维度接近(2+1)维中的相关阈值；给出了单线态、三线态和五线态单极子激发的对称性扇区预测。
AI.conclusion: 枫叶晶格作为大味道数平台为检验紧致QED₃在量子磁体中的稳定性提供了具体途径，对称性分辨的精确对角化和变分研究可用于验证N_f=12狄拉克自旋液体的存在。

title: Quasiparticle GW for Superconductors: Toward a Unified Treatment of Electron-Phonon and Electron-Plasmon Couplings
summary: Superconducting two-dimensional materials, and in particular few-layer graphene, offer an exciting platform for low-power electronics, yet the origin of their unconventional superconductivity remains an open question. Prevailing theories, primarily rooted in the Bardeen-Cooper-Schrieffer (BCS) framework that assumes electron-phonon interactions are the main mechanism of superconductivity, struggle to account quantitatively for the observed phenomena. Recent studies point to a plasmonic pairing mechanism in graphene systems; however, disentangling the relative contributions of phonon- and plasmon-mediated pairing remains challenging due to the lack of a satisfactory first-principles framework capable of accurately capturing dynamical screening effects in the electronic channel. Here, we present a new theoretical framework that extends the quasiparticle self-consistent GW method to the superconducting phase by coupling it with the Eliashberg treatment of both phonon- and plasmon-mediated interactions. Our approach, termed "s-qpGW", is on par with the state-of-the-art Eliashberg theory of superconductivity when applied to bulk metals, and correctly predicts the absence of superconductivity in doped monolayer graphene. To differentiate s-qpGW from conventional Eliashberg approaches, we study a simple model system, graphene with an artificially enhanced density of states, and demonstrate that s-qpGW captures dynamical Coulomb screening effects in ways that standard BCS theory cannot.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个名为"s-qpGW"的新理论框架，通过将准粒子自洽GW方法与Eliashberg理论结合，首次能够从第一性原理同时处理声子和等离激元介导的超导配对机制。该方法准确预测了掺杂单层石墨烯中不存在超导性，并能够捕捉标准BCS理论无法描述的动力学库仑屏蔽效应。
AI.motivation: 现有基于BCS理论的电声子相互作用模型无法定量解释石墨烯等二维超导体的实验现象，而等离激元配对机制的贡献因缺乏能准确捕捉电子通道动力学屏蔽效应的第一性原理框架而难以区分。
AI.method: 将准粒子自洽GW方法扩展到超导相，并与处理声子和等离激元介导相互作用的Eliashberg理论耦合，形成"s-qpGW"框架。
AI.result: s-qpGW方法在应用于块体金属时与最先进的Eliashberg超导理论相当，并正确预测了掺杂单层石墨烯中无超导性。在人工增强态密度的石墨烯模型中，s-qpGW成功捕获了BCS理论无法描述的动力学库仑屏蔽效应。
AI.conclusion: s-qpGW为从第一性原理研究非常规超导提供了有力工具，尤其适用于理解二维材料中声子和等离激元配对机制的相对贡献。

title: Equilibrium Stabilization of a Hidden Phase Like Metallic State in 1T-TaS2
summary: Electronic phases that lie outside the equilibrium ground state offer a route to explore competing configurations in correlated materials. In 1T-TaS2, ultrafast excitation accesses a metallic hidden phase that is distinct from the commensurate insulating ground state. Here we use angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy to show that an equivalent electronic configuration is stabilized in exfoliated intermediate-thickness 1T-TaS2 flakes, where it persists up to room temperature before evolving through a different sequence of electronic transitions. This equilibrium hidden-phase-like state hosts a metallic band with finite Fermi-level spectral weight while retaining the characteristic hybridization gaps associated with the star-of-David band folding. These results establish a platform for controlling competing electronic states in layered materials, with implications for both quantum science and phase change technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文报道在1T-TaS2薄片中观察到一种平衡态下的隐藏相类似电子态，该态具有金属性和大卫之星能带折叠特征，并可在室温下稳定存在。
AI.motivation: 探索平衡基态之外竞争电子态的稳定化途径，特别是在1T-TaS2中实现非平衡隐藏相的平衡态稳定化。
AI.method: 采用角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）对中等厚度剥离的1T-TaS2薄片进行电子结构表征。
AI.result: 在剥离的1T-TaS2薄片中发现了平衡态隐藏相类似态，该态在室温下稳定存在，具有费米面处有限谱权重以及大卫之星能带折叠形成的特征杂化能隙。
AI.conclusion: 建立了在层状材料中调控竞争电子态的平台，对量子科学和相变技术有重要意义。

title: A Force-Kernel Reformulation of the Extended-System Adaptive Biasing Force for Free-Energy Calculations
summary: We introduce force-kernel extended-system adaptive biasing force (FK-eABF), a force-based kernel reformulation of eABF that replaces the histogram-based mean-force accumulator of conventional eABF with a sparse population of Gaussian kernels storing local running-mean forces. Biasing forces are recovered by Nadaraya-Watson regression, yielding smooth estimates from the earliest stages of a simulation without a minimum-count threshold, while the same kernel population also defines an auxiliary, self-attenuating exploration force that requires no prior knowledge of barrier heights. On N-acetyl-N'-methylalanylamide in explicit water, FK-eABF achieves full free-energy landscape coverage faster than well-tempered metadynamics (WT-MetaD), on-the-fly probability enhanced sampling (OPES), and WTM-eABF, while all four methods converge to comparable accuracy given sufficient time. FK-eABF also retains long-time accuracy: on the DFG-in/out transition of Abl1 kinase, multi-microsecond simulations recover the established near-isoenergetic balance between states. At the opposite extreme, applied to the electrocyclic ring closure of 1,3-butadiene at the ab initio molecular dynamics level, FK-eABF recovers the free-energy landscape within 30 ps. Together, these benchmarks, spanning more than four orders of magnitude in simulation time, establish FK-eABF as more than a kernelized implementation of eABF: A force-based kernel reformulation that delivers faster early-time convergence without sacrificing long-time quantitative accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FK-eABF方法，用高斯核替代直方图进行平均力累积，通过Nadaraya-Watson回归恢复偏置力，实现平滑估计和快速收敛。在多个体系（从肽段到蛋白激酶再到ab initio MD）上验证，FK-eABF比WT-MetaD、OPES、WTM-eABF更快覆盖自由能面，且长期精度不损失。
AI.motivation: 传统的eABF方法使用直方图累积平均力，存在最小计数阈值的问题，导致早期阶段估计不准确且不光滑。希望发展一种核函数化方法，既保留eABF的长期精度，又能加速早期收敛。
AI.method: FK-eABF将eABF中直方图累积平均力的方式替换为稀疏高斯核种群，存储局部运行平均力。偏置力通过Nadaraya-Watson回归恢复，无需最小计数阈值即可获得光滑估计。同时，同一核种群还定义了一个自衰减的探索力，无需先验了解能垒高度。
AI.result: 在N-乙酰-N'-甲基丙氨酰胺（水溶液中）上，FK-eABF比WT-MetaD、OPES、WTM-eABF更快覆盖自由能面，四种方法在足够时间后精度相当。在Abl1激酶的DFG-in/out转变中，微秒级模拟恢复了近等能平衡。在1,3-丁二烯电环闭合反应的ab initio MD水平上，30 ps内恢复自由能面。
AI.conclusion: FK-eABF不仅是一种eABF的核化实现，更是一种基于力的核函数重构方法，在跨越四个数量级的模拟时间尺度上，实现了更快的早期收敛而不牺牲长期定量精度。

title: pANO-F12: An atomic natural orbital-inspired route to more compact basis sets for F12 explicitly correlated methods
comment: 33 pages draft; basis sets part of download package
summary: Explicitly correlated methods such as MP2-F12 and CCSD(F12*) exhibit much faster basis set convergence (asymptotically $\propto L^{-7}$, with L the highest angular momentum) than orbital-only approaches. Yet it has been pointed out that cc-pVnZ-F12 basis sets themselves are substantially larger than the corresponding cc-pVnZ, and specifically that cc-pVDZ-F12 is the size of cc-pVTZ. One way to generate compact basis sets in an orbital-only context are Atomic Natural Orbital (ANO) basis sets [J. Almlöf and P. R. Taylor, JCP 86, 4070 (1987)]. However, obtaining the required first-order reduced density matrix while properly accounting for the F12 geminal is problematic. In this work, we show that an energy minimization-based contraction process under linear independence constraints yields `pseudo-ANO' (pANO) basis sets that are functionally equivalent in quality. Subsequently, we apply this recipe to obtain pANO-F12 basis sets from the same elements, then validate them for several thermochemical benchmarks and for the hypersensitive out-of-plane vibrations of benzene. We show that, unlike cc-pVnZ-F12, pANO-F12 exhibits the familiar shell structure seen in cc-pVnZ and ANO basis sets, and that pANO-F12 offers a route to more compact F12 basis sets more amenable to medium-sized systems, especially in conjunction with localized pair natural orbital approaches. Overall, the pANO approach is most beneficial for the smaller double-and triple-zeta basis sets, offering either superior performance to cc-pVnZ-F12 at same cost, or similar performance at lower cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于能量最小化和线性独立约束的"伪自然原子轨道"(pANO)方法，用于生成紧凑的F12显式相关基组。pANO-F12基组相比传统的cc-pVnZ-F12基组更紧凑，在双ζ和三ζ级别上具有同等或更优的性能，且保留了与cc-pVnZ和ANO基组相似的壳层结构，更适合中等规模体系的计算。
AI.motivation: 传统的cc-pVnZ-F12显式相关基组虽然收敛快，但基组尺寸偏大（如cc-pVDZ-F12相当于cc-pVTZ大小），限制了在中等规模体系中的应用。而现有的ANO基组方法虽然能生成紧凑基组，但无法正确处理F12双电子相关因子所需的约化一阶密度矩阵。因此需要开发一种既能保持紧凑性又能兼容F12方法的基组生成方案。
AI.method: 采用基于能量最小化的收缩过程，在线性独立约束条件下生成"伪自然原子轨道"(pANO)基组。具体地，从相同元素出发，通过能量优化而非依赖自然轨道截断的方式得到收缩基组，从而避免了对F12相关因子约化密度矩阵的处理难题，同时保证了基组的功能等价性。
AI.result: pANO-F12基组具有与cc-pVnZ-F12相当或更优的性能，同时基组尺寸更小。pANO-F12保留了cc-pVnZ和ANO基组常见的壳层结构，而cc-pVnZ-F12不具备这一特性。在双ζ和三ζ级别上优势最为明显，可与局域对自然轨道(LPNO)方法配合使用，更适用于中等规模体系。
AI.conclusion: pANO方法为生成紧凑的F12基组提供了一条有效途径，在保持计算精度的同时显著降低了基组尺寸，尤其对双ζ和三ζ级别的F12计算具有重要实用价值。

title: Aggregation-Fragmentation Processes with Broken Detailed Balance
summary: We study aggregation-fragmentation processes in which pairs of clusters can aggregate, and each cluster can break into two fragments. If the rates of aggregation and fragmentation do not depend on the masses, detailed balance does not hold, but nonequilibrium steady states can still be deduced from an exact solution for the Laplace transform. For models in which aggregation rates remain constant but fragmentation rates scale as $(\text{mass})^β$, detailed balance holds only when $β=1$. Away from this solvable case, we employ asymptotic techniques and show that when $β\geq 0$, the steady states share similarities with those from the mass-independent ($β=0$) model. An instantaneous shattering transition with continuous mass loss occurs when $β<0$.

AI.tldr: 研究了聚合-碎片化过程中非平衡稳态的精确解与渐近行为，发现仅当碎片速率与质量呈线性关系时满足细致平衡，否则系统呈现类似质量无关模型的行为或发生瞬时破碎相变。
AI.motivation: 探究在聚合与碎片化速率不满足质量独立性时，非平衡稳态是否仍然存在且可解析描述，特别是当详细平衡条件被违反时的系统行为。
AI.method: 利用Laplace变换的精确解法推导非平衡稳态，结合渐近分析方法研究碎片化速率随质量幂次缩放（质量指数β）的广义模型。
AI.result: 仅当β=1时系统满足详细平衡；β≥0时稳态行为与质量无关模型相似；β<0时出现瞬时破碎相变导致连续质量损失。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了聚合-碎片化过程中非平衡稳态的存在条件与相变行为，指出详细平衡非必要条件，且β的符号决定系统是否发生质量损失相变。

title: Enhancement in Magnetic and Magnetocaloric Properties of CoFe2O4 Nanofibers at Lower Temperatures
summary: This research paper investigates new and first insights into the magnetic and magnetocaloric properties of one-dimensional (1D) cobalt ferrite CoFe2O4 (CFO) nanofibers elaborated by sol gel based electrospinning technique, particularly focusing on their behavior at low temperatures for specific applications. The calcined CFO nanofibers microstructural, structural, magnetic, and magnetocaloric properties were explored. The nanofibers (NFs) microstructure, with an average diameter of 210 nm, was examined by scanning and transmission electron microscopies (SEM, TEM). The X-ray diffraction (XRD) of the CFO nanofibers showed a pure cubic close-packed (c.c.p) spinel crystalline structure with the F d 3 -m space group. The Raman spectroscopic studies further confirm the cubic inverse spinel phase. The Magnetic properties were explored as a function of temperature, ranging from 10 to 300 K, a ferromagnetic behaviour was observed with the highest saturation magnetization of 75.87 emu g(-1) and a coercivity of 723 Oe at room temperature. The variation of the magnetic entropy was measured indirectly using the Maxwell approach with an increasing magnetic field. A maximum of Delta(S)=1.71 J K-1 was reached around 32 K. At 180 K, the associated adiabatic temperature change, Delta (Tmax), was 0.93 K, with a large RCP value of 7.58 J kg-1 was measured, which is reasonably high for the corresponding nanoparticles (NPs). This work may suggest that 1D CFO nanofibers offer a promising route for the production of nanostructured magnetic materials, potentially impacting various electronic and electromagnetic device applications at low temperatures.

AI.tldr: 本文通过溶胶-凝胶静电纺丝技术制备了钴铁氧体(CoFe2O4)一维纳米纤维，系统研究了其在10-300K温度范围内的磁性和磁热效应，发现其具有较高的饱和磁化强度(75.87 emu/g)、磁熵变(1.71 J/K)和相对制冷能力(7.58 J/kg)，表明该材料在低温电子和电磁器件领域具有应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 探索一维钴铁氧体纳米纤维在低温下的磁性和磁热性能，为开发新型纳米结构磁性材料用于低温电子和电磁器件提供理论依据和实验基础。
AI.method: 采用溶胶-凝胶静电纺丝技术制备CoFe2O4纳米纤维；利用SEM/TEM表征微观形貌；XRD和拉曼光谱分析晶体结构；通过VSM测量温度依赖的磁性能；使用Maxwell关系间接计算磁熵变。
AI.result: 纳米纤维平均直径210 nm，为纯立方密堆积尖晶石结构；室温下饱和磁化强度75.87 emu/g，矫顽力723 Oe；32 K时最大磁熵变1.71 J/K；180 K时绝热温变0.93 K，相对制冷能力7.58 J/kg。
AI.conclusion: 一维CoFe2O4纳米纤维在低温下展现出优异的磁热性能，为制备高性能纳米结构磁性材料提供了新思路，有望应用于低温电子和电磁器件。

title: Direct observation of the transverse near field of an edge excitation and associated slow secondary dynamics in a fractional quantum Hall state
summary: We report stroboscopic time-resolved photoluminescence (PL) microscopy and spectroscopy revealing the transverse near field of an edge excitation in a $ν=1/3$ fractional quantum Hall (FQH) state. Time-resolved $y$-$t$ maps reveal an immediate PL response extending more than $30~μ\mathrm{m}$ into the bulk transverse to the edge when the edge magnetoplasmon (EMP) passes the mesa boundary. The nearly instantaneous nature of this long-range response identifies it as the non-radiative, quasi-electrostatic near field, revealing the EMP as a spatially extended collective excitation rather than a strictly one-dimensional charge-density oscillation. We also observe secondary bulk-side responses distinct from the immediate transverse near-field response. The coexistence of these immediate and secondary responses shows that electrically launched edge excitations produce bulk-side dynamics on widely separated time scales.

AI.tldr: 本文通过时间分辨光致发光显微镜和光谱学，揭示了ν=1/3分数量子霍尔态中边缘激发的横向近场，发现边缘磁等离激元通过准静电近场在超过30μm范围内瞬时影响体态，表明其为空间扩展的集体激发而非严格一维振荡。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为边缘磁等离激元（EMP）是一维电荷密度振荡，但其横向近场特性尚未被直接观测，作者希望揭示EMP的真实空间扩展性质。
AI.method: 采用频闪时间分辨光致发光显微镜和光谱学技术，测量时间分辨的y-t映射图，分析边缘激发后体态中的PL响应。
AI.result: 观察到EMP经过边界时立即在超过30μm范围内出现PL响应（非辐射准静电近场），以及随后出现的次级体态响应，表明存在时间尺度差异很大的体态动力学。
AI.conclusion: EMP是空间扩展的集体激发而非严格一维振荡；边缘激发可在体态中产生跨越广泛时间尺度的动力学响应。

title: Anomalous acoustoelectric signatures of chiral superconductivity
summary: The identification of unconventional pairing in two-dimensional materials is a central challenge in modern condensed matter physics. While chiral p-wave superconductivity offers a promising platform for topological quantum computing, its detection remains elusive due to the inherent limitations of optical probes in the two-dimensional limit. We propose the anomalous acoustoelectric effect as a robust, alternative to optical signature of p-wave paring symmetry. We demonstrate that an acoustic wave induces a transverse dc current resulting in a measurable condensate phase difference on sample boundaries originating from the anisotropic scattering of quasiparticles in the absence of an external magnetic field. Crucially, the quasiparticle-mediated acoustoelectric response dominates near the critical temperature and, unlike the superconducting condensate, is not suppressed by electron-hole asymmetry factor. These results establish the anomalous acoustoelectric effect as a high-sensitivity electrical probe of the chiral order parameter, providing a tool for experimental detecting of unconventional pairing in superconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出反常声电效应作为一种稳健的光学替代方案，用于探测二维材料中的手性p波超导配对。声波在无外磁场条件下诱导出横向直流电流，产生可测量的凝聚态相位差，该效应在临界温度附近占主导且不受电子-空穴不对称性抑制，为检测非常规超导配对提供了高灵敏度电学探针。
AI.motivation: 二维材料中非常规配对（特别是手性p波超导）的识别是凝聚态物理的核心挑战，但因光学探针在二维极限下的固有局限性，检测一直难以实现。
AI.method: 提出反常声电效应作为光学探针的替代方案。利用声波在无外磁场条件下诱导横向直流电流，通过准粒子各向异性散射在样品边界产生可测量的凝聚态相位差。
AI.result: 准粒子介导的声电响应在临界温度附近占主导地位，且不像超导凝聚态那样受到电子-空穴不对称性因子的抑制。
AI.conclusion: 反常声电效应可作为手性序参量的高灵敏度电学探针，为实验检测超导体中的非常规配对提供了一种有效工具。

title: Emergent magnetic and charge ordered phases in freestanding ultrathin \ce{LaVO3}
summary: Transition metal oxide perovskites are an ideal platform for exploring the interplay between spin, orbital, charge and lattice degrees of freedom. Among them, \ce{LaVO3} has been extensively studied in heterostructures and superlattices, where exotic phases have been reported. Motivated by the advances in freestanding oxide membranes, we investigate the intrinsic properties of freestanding ultrathin \ce{LaVO3} films using density functional theory. Our calculations reveal a sequence of magnetic phase transitions with thickness, starting from stripe-AFM in monolayer until the bulk like C-AFM is recovered. Beyond four layers, polar catastrophe driven charge transfer dopes the surface layers giving rise to stripe-AFM and ferromagnetic surface states while the central layers remain bulk like. We further explore this fact by studying charge doped monolayer, discovering that hole doping drives the system into ferromagnetic state. Doping also induced charge ordering in the system. A striped charge ordering pattern is observed at 0.5 h/fu, while a 3:1 stripe pattern emerges at 0.25 h/fu, indicating that the periodicity of the superstructure changes with doping concentration.

AI.tldr: 本文利用密度泛函理论研究了自支撑超薄LaVO₃薄膜，发现厚度驱动的磁相变序列（从条纹反铁磁到体相C-反铁磁），以及极化灾难导致的电荷转移和表面磁态变化。还研究了空穴掺杂诱导的铁磁态和电荷有序现象。
AI.motivation: 受自支撑氧化物薄膜制备进展的启发，旨在探究自支撑超薄LaVO₃薄膜的本征性质，揭示其在不同厚度下的磁性和电子结构演化。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT）计算，对自支撑超薄LaVO₃薄膜进行模拟，研究不同厚度和空穴掺杂浓度下的磁序与电荷有序行为。
AI.result: 发现随厚度增加，磁序从单层的条纹反铁磁转变为体相的C型反铁磁；超过四层时，极化灾难驱动的电荷转移使表面层出现条纹反铁磁和铁磁态，中心层保持体相。空穴掺杂可诱导铁磁态，并在特定浓度下形成不同周期的条纹电荷有序结构。
AI.conclusion: LaVO₃薄膜的磁性和电子结构可被厚度和掺杂有效调控，为在氧化物薄膜中实现新奇量子态提供了理论依据。

title: Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials: Advancing Open-Source Software for Efficient and Scalable Molecular Simulation
summary: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) enable atomistic simulations with near ab initio accuracy at significantly reduced computational cost, but their broader adoption is often limited by fragmented tooling, limited scalability, and inflexible software design. We present mlip v2, a new generation of the mlip library that advances efficient and scalable molecular simulation through a unified and extensible framework. The new release features a targeted API redesign with improved modularity and control, enabling flexible customization of training, data processing, and simulation workflows. It further integrates a new high-performance backend for equivariant operations, e3j, significantly accelerating model inference and simulations. In addition, the framework introduces a range of entirely new capabilities, including the eSEN architecture with a Mixture-of-Experts formulation for scalable training on large and diverse datasets, improved handling of electrostatics through more physically grounded charge modeling and long-range interaction treatment, and advanced simulation features such as NPT ensembles and nudged elastic band methods. Together, these extensions significantly broaden the scope of MLIP applications, enabling efficient modeling of complex, reactive, and out-of-equilibrium systems, and bridging the gap between ML research and practical molecular simulation applications. The library is available on GitHub and on PyPI under the Apache license 2.0.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了mlip v2，新一代机器学习原子间势库，通过统一可扩展框架、API重新设计、高性能后端e3j、eSEN架构、改进的静电处理和新模拟功能（NPT、NEB），提升了MLIP的可扩展性、效率和适用范围。
AI.motivation: 当前MLIP工具存在碎片化、可扩展性有限和软件设计不够灵活的问题，限制了其广泛应用，因此需要构建一个统一、可扩展且高效的框架。
AI.method: 通过API重新设计提升模块化和可控性；集成高性能e3j后端加速等变操作；引入eSEN架构（Mixture-of-Experts）支持大规模多样化数据集的训练；改进电荷建模和长程相互作用以更好处理静电；新增NPT系综和NEB等高级模拟功能。
AI.result: mlip v2显著加速了模型推理和模拟，扩展了MLIP应用范围，支持复杂、反应性和非平衡系统的高效建模。
AI.conclusion: 新版本弥合了机器学习研究与实际分子模拟应用之间的差距，以Apache 2.0许可证在GitHub和PyPI上开源发布。

title: The cell fluid model with Curie-Weiss interactions: special cases and analytical results
summary: Inspired by previous extensive numerical studies of a cell fluid model with Curie-Weiss interactions, we concentrate on some analytically tractable special cases in its description. The key ingredient of the model is a competition between global attraction and local repulsion interactions between particles with coupling constants $J_1$ and $J_2$, respectively. We provide analytical results in several limiting cases, including the ideal-gas limit $J_1=J_2=0$ and the strong-repulsion limit $J_2\gg J_1$. For $J_2\gg J_1$, a detailed analytical study is presented. We derive explicit expressions for the critical point parameters, the equation of state, and the binodal and spinodal curves in closed form. The equation of state is found to be in full agreement with that of the van der Waals lattice gas, and the order parameter satisfies the standard Curie-Weiss equation. In a neighborhood of the critical point, a Landau expansion is shown to have the same form and symmetry as that of the classical lattice gas within the mean-field approximation. Moreover, based on the explicit knowledge of a few leading terms in the asymptotic expansion of the deformed exponential function governing the physics of the cell model, we extend its validity range to include the marginal case of thermodynamic stability, $J_1=J_2$. In particular, this extension makes a consideration of the ideal-gas limit $J_1=J_2=0$ formally legitimate. For the generic marginal case $J_1=J_2\ne0$ systematically avoided in previous works, we present numerical data and phase diagrams that augment their findings for $J_2>J_1$.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了一个具有Curie-Weiss相互作用的细胞流体模型，重点关注全局吸引(J₁)与局部排斥(J₂)之间的竞争。在强排斥极限(J₂≫J₁)下推导了临界点、状态方程、双节线和旋节线的解析表达式，发现状态方程与范德瓦尔斯晶格气体完全一致，序参数满足标准Curie-Weiss方程。通过渐近展开扩展了模型的适用性至热力学稳定边缘情况(J₁=J₂)，并提供了数值结果和相图。
AI.motivation: 受先前对具有Curie-Weiss相互作用的细胞流体模型大量数值研究的启发，本文旨在处理该模型中一些解析可解的特例，以深入理解全局吸引与局部排斥竞争机制。
AI.method: 采用解析方法，分别在理想气体极限(J₁=J₂=0)和强排斥极限(J₂≫J₁)下进行严格推导。通过渐进展开技术，将模型的有效性扩展至J₁=J₂的边缘情况，并辅以数值计算。
AI.result: 得到了临界点参数、状态方程、双节线和旋节线的封闭解析表达式。状态方程与范德瓦尔斯晶格气体一致，序参数满足Curie-Weiss方程。在J₂≫J₁和J₁=J₂情况下均获得有效结果。
AI.conclusion: 该模型在强排斥极限下与经典平均场晶格气体理论等价，且通过渐近展开扩展后能描述热力学稳定边缘情况，补充了前人仅对J₂>J₁的研究。

title: Uncovering Antipolar Ordering and Pressure-Tunable Phases in Hexagonal LaN
summary: We predict an antipolar instability in hexagonal LaN using first-principles density functional theory. Starting from a nonpolar hexagonal phase, we identify competing polar and antipolar zone-center phonon instabilities. Condensation of the polar and antipolar modes stabilizes, respectively, dynamically stable wurtzite (WZ) phase and an hexagonal antipolar (AP) phase which is characterized by alternating local polarization and zero net macroscopic polarization within the unit cell. At ambient conditions, the AP phase is metastable with respect to the WZ phase, and a finite energy barrier exists between these phases, suggesting a possible polarization-switching pathway via the AP intermediate state. The energy barrier between the WZ and AP phases decreases with increasing pressure, indicating enhanced tunability between polar and antipolar states. The sublattice polarization increases with pressure in the AP phase, while it decreases in the WZ phase. We further find that, with increasing pressure, the rock-salt and tetragonal phases of LaN become more stable than the hexagonal phases (AP and WZ). Consequently, the realization of the AP phase is more favorable in the low-pressure regime, where hexagonal phases remain energetically competitive. These results demonstrate pressure-driven competition between polar and antipolar phases in LaN and point toward antiferroelectric-like behavior in this binary nitride system.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算预测了六方LaN中存在反极性不稳定性，发现极性与反极性声子模式竞争，并揭示了压力驱动的极性与反极性相变及可能的反铁电行为。
AI.motivation: 探索六方LaN中是否存在反极性（antipolar）不稳定性，以及极性与反极性相之间的竞争与调控机制，为理解二元氮化物中的反铁电行为提供基础。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理密度泛函理论（DFT）计算，从非极性六方相出发，分析布里渊区中心的极性（polar）和反极性（antipolar）声子不稳定性，并研究高压下的相稳定性变化。
AI.result: 1) 发现极性与反极性两种声子不稳定性；2) 极性模式凝聚得到稳定的纤锌矿（WZ）相，反极性模式凝聚得到反极性（AP）六方相；3) AP相在常压下亚稳，与WZ相之间存在能垒；4) 加压下WZ与AP间能垒降低，可调性增强；5) AP相的子晶格极化随压力增加，WZ相则相反；6) 高压下岩盐相和四方相变得更稳定。
AI.conclusion: LaN中极性与反极性相之间存在压力驱动的竞争，AP相在低压区更易实现，暗示该二元氮化物体系可能具有反铁电行为。

title: Gyromagnetic Quantum Friction in Rayleigh Vorticity Baths
summary: We identify an intrinsic zero-temperature relaxation channel for near-surface spins gyromagnetically coupled to Rayleigh-wave vorticity. This surface-mode contribution requires no thermal phonons, unlike Raman relaxation, and is fixed by Rayleigh vorticity rather than material-specific $g$-factor modulation. The Rayleigh-vorticity bath is super-Ohmic and evanescent with depth, producing field and depth scalings of spin relaxation. These scalings establish shallow spin sensors and hybrid surface-acoustic-wave spin interfaces as detectors of Rayleigh-wave acoustic quantum friction in solids.

AI.tldr: 本文发现了一种近表面自旋与瑞利波涡度耦合导致的零温弛豫通道，该机制不依赖热声子，由瑞利波涡度而非材料g因子调制决定，并给出了自旋弛豫随磁场和深度的标度关系，为探测固体中的瑞利波声学量子摩擦提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 识别近表面自旋在零温下的一种本征弛豫通道，该通道不依赖热声子（不同于拉曼弛豫），由瑞利波涡度驱动。
AI.method: 理论分析近表面自旋与瑞利波涡度的旋磁耦合，研究弛豫的零温行为、谱密度（超欧姆型）及随深度和磁场的标度关系。
AI.result: 该弛豫通道是超欧姆型的，随深度呈衰减特性，自旋弛豫随磁场和深度具有特定的标度关系。
AI.conclusion: 该机制为浅层自旋传感器和混合表面声波自旋界面提供了探测固体中瑞利波声学量子摩擦的理论工具。

title: Observation of Altermagnetic Order Switching in Bulk MnTe by Polarized Neutron Diffraction
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. Accepted for publication in Phys. Rev. Lett
summary: Altermagnetic order, characterized by the Néel vector, breaks time-reversal symmetry (TRS) even in the nonrelativistic limit. Although spin-polarized and anomalous transport phenomena emerge with this order, they are mutually compensated by TRS-connected antiphase domains with opposite Néel vectors. Here we employ polarized neutron diffraction to directly probe the altermagnetic order in MnTe. Pronounced nuclear-magnetic interference terms were observed, providing direct evidence of a net Néel vector in the bulk crystal. Moreover, a weak ferromagnetic moment (WFM), originating from relativistic spin-orbit coupling, was found to be coupled with the altermagnetic order. Both the altermagnetic order and the WFM can be switched by milli-Tesla-scale magnetic field cooling.

AI.tldr: 本文通过极化中子衍射实验直接证实了MnTe中的交变磁有序，发现其奈尔矢量在体材料中非零，并且由自旋-轨道耦合产生的弱铁磁矩与交变磁有序耦合，两者均可由毫特斯拉量级的磁场冷却翻转。
AI.motivation: 交变磁有序即使在非相对论极限下也会打破时间反演对称性，但其自旋极化和反常输运现象会被具有相反奈尔矢量的反相畴抵消，因此需要直接探测体材料中净奈尔矢量的存在。
AI.method: 使用极化中子衍射技术，通过测量核-磁干涉项来直接探测MnTe中的交变磁有序。
AI.result: 观测到显著的核-磁干涉项，直接证明体材料中存在净奈尔矢量；同时发现自旋-轨道耦合导致的弱铁磁矩与交变磁有序耦合。
AI.conclusion: 交变磁有序和弱铁磁矩均可通过毫特斯拉量级的磁场冷却实现翻转，为交变磁体的操控提供了新途径。

title: Superconductivity in doped spin multimer systems
summary: Binding energy, which quantifies pair formation, is a key factor in the emergence of superconductivity. Here, we show that even when multiple spins are complexly coupled, hole-doped systems, which can be mapped onto the universal hardcore boson model in the strong-binding-energy limit, exhibit promising signatures of superconductivity. We analytically and numerically demonstrate this concept in the double Kondo lattice model. Using the density-matrix renormalization group method, we show that a pairing state is maintained via a crossover even for parameters away from the strong-coupling regime. Additionally, we find that once binding energies are sufficiently generated, pair correlations develop similarly regardless of the details of local spin correlations. Our findings suggest useful guidelines for research on superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了强结合能极限下空穴掺杂系统的超导性，通过双Kondo格子模型的解析与数值分析，发现配对态在参数变化时仍能维持，且结合能足够产生后，配对关联发展不依赖于局域自旋关联细节，为超导研究提供了新思路。
AI.motivation: 结合能是超导配对形成的关键因素，但多重自旋复杂耦合下的超导机制尚不明确。本文旨在探讨强结合能极限下空穴掺杂系统的超导特征，并验证其在不同参数区域的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将空穴掺杂系统映射到通用硬核玻色子模型，采用密度矩阵重正化群（DMRG）方法对双Kondo格子模型进行解析与数值分析，研究配对态在不同耦合参数下的行为。
AI.result: 在强结合能极限下，空穴掺杂系统表现出超导特征；即使偏离强耦合区域，配对态仍通过交叉（crossover）维持；结合能足够大时，配对关联发展对局域自旋关联细节不敏感。
AI.conclusion: 研究为超导材料设计提供了实用指导原则，表明强结合能条件下超导配对具有鲁棒性，且无需精细调控自旋关联细节。

title: Revisiting the high-field phase diagram of the topological cubic helimagnet SrFeO$_{3}$
summary: The cubic perovskite SrFeO$_{3}$ is a prototypical centrosymmetric itinerant magnet that hosts a quadruple-${\mathbf Q}$ hedgehog-antihedgehog lattice and exhibits a complex magnetic-field-temperature phase diagram. Yet, the microscopic mechanism underlying the emergence of its versatile multiple-${\mathbf Q}$ phases remains unresolved. Here, we elucidate the field-orientation dependence of the magnetic phase diagram and establish an effective spin Hamiltonian for SrFeO$_{3}$ that incorporates a cubic single-ion anisotropy together with bilinear and biquadratic interactions in momentum space. In addition, we observe magnetoelastic signatures of a first-order valence transition upon entering the forced FM phase at 40 T, which would be attributed to the suppression of negative charge transfer. These findings emphasize the pivotal importance of electronic itinerancy arising from the formation of a ligand-hole band in stabilizing multiple-${\mathbf Q}$ phases.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了立方钙钛矿SrFeO₃中多重Q相形成的微观机制，建立了包含立方单离子各向异性及动量空间双线性、双二次相互作用的有效自旋哈密顿量，并观察到40 T下进入受迫铁磁相时的一级价态转变的磁弹信号。
AI.motivation: SrFeO₃作为中心对称巡游磁体，虽已知拥有四重Q hedgehog-antihedgehog晶格及复杂磁场-温度相图，但其多重Q相出现的微观机制尚不明确，亟需阐明。
AI.method: 通过研究磁场取向依赖性，构建有效自旋哈密顿量（包含立方单离子各向异性、动量空间双线性和双二次相互作用），并结合高场磁弹测量。
AI.result: 发现40 T下进入受迫铁磁相时出现一级价态转变的磁弹信号，归因于负电荷转移被抑制；建立了可描述多重Q相的有效自旋模型。
AI.conclusion: 电子巡游性（源于配体空穴带的形成）在稳定多重Q相中起关键作用。

title: Entanglement Dynamics across a Monitored Quantum Point Contact
summary: We compute the entanglement dynamics across a monitored quantum point contact, where particle losses are recorded on a given site, and demonstrate how this single-site local monitoring substantially reshapes the entanglement production. Contrary to the unitary case, where entanglement entropy grows logarithmically in time, here we find first a linear growth, up to a maximum value displaying volume-law scaling, and then a slow decay to zero, as the system empties out. We capture this crossover using a quasiparticle picture, where the first linear growth arises due to an emergent bias voltage established by the losses, which eventually decays away as the system depletes. We connect our results to studies of the Page curve and to experimentally relevant probes, via full counting statistics of charge transfer across a subregion, with only a single channel to unravel leading to a favorable scaling of the postselection overhead. Natural platforms for this setting include mesoscopic systems and ultracold atoms.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一个受监测的量子点接触中的纠缠动力学，发现局域粒子损耗会导致纠缠熵从对数增长变为线性增长（达到体积律标度的最大值），随后缓慢衰减至零，并用量子准粒子图像和全计数统计解释了这一行为。
AI.motivation: 传统研究关注幺正演化下的纠缠动力学，而局域监测（如粒子损耗）如何影响纠缠产生尚不清晰。作者旨在揭示单点局域监测对纠缠动力学的重塑作用。
AI.method: 通过计算受监测量子点接触中的纠缠熵演化，引入量子准粒子图像解释交叉行为，并结合全计数统计与Page曲线进行理论分析。
AI.result: 发现纠缠熵先线性增长至体积律标度的最大值，后缓慢衰减至零；而幺正情况下纠缠熵仅为对数增长。
AI.conclusion: 局域监测通过建立偏压效应改变了纠缠动力学行为，该结果与Page曲线、全计数统计相关，适用于介观系统和超冷原子等实验平台。

title: Microwave-Stimulated Serpentinization of Olivine for Geological Hydrogen Production
summary: Serpentinization of ultramafic rocks is a naturally occurring mineralogical process that can generate molecular hydrogen through the oxidation of ferrous iron during water-rock reaction. Although the resource potential is large, the natural reaction is kinetically limited, and practical hydrogen recovery requires methods that can accelerate conversion without imposing an energy penalty that exceeds the value of the hydrogen produced. This short communication reports a preliminary atmospheric-pressure microwave serpentinization experiment using a water-saturated 2 g crushed olivine sample. Microwave irradiation produced a rapid increase in measured hydrogen concentration compared with conventional hot-plate heating under otherwise similar conditions. The preliminary experiment showed approximately a 12-fold increase in hydrogen concentration and an apparent rate increase from about 2 ppb s$^{-1}$ for conventional heating to about 10 ppb s$^{-1}$ during microwave exposure. These results suggest that electromagnetic stimulation can enhance serpentinization kinetics, likely through rapid volumetric heating, selective coupling to iron-bearing phases, and localized thermal gradients. The result provides an initial experimental basis for evaluating microwave stimulation as a route to accelerated geologic hydrogen production and motivates follow-on measurements using calibrated gas analysis, absorbed-power measurements, dielectric characterization, and elevated-pressure testing.

AI.tldr: 这篇短文报告了在大气压条件下对蛇纹石化过程进行微波加热的初步实验，发现与传统加热相比，微波照射可使氢气浓度提升约12倍，反应速率从约2 ppb/s增至约10 ppb/s，表明电磁刺激可加速蛇纹石化反应，为地质氢气生产提供了新思路。
AI.motivation: 蛇纹石化反应可自然生成分子氢，但反应动力学受限；为了在不产生过高能量代价的前提下加速转化、实现氢气的经济回收，研究者探索了微波加热的可行性。
AI.method: 在大气压条件下，对2 g含水橄榄石样品进行微波照射实验，并与常规热板加热进行对比，测量氢气浓度随时间的变化。
AI.result: 微波照射使氢气浓度提升约12倍，表观速率从常规加热的约2 ppb/s增至约10 ppb/s。
AI.conclusion: 电磁刺激（微波加热）可显著加速蛇纹石化动力学，可能归因于快速体积加热、对含铁相的优先耦合以及局部温度梯度；该结果为加速地质氢气生产提供了初步实验依据，后续需进行校准气体分析、吸收功率测量、介电表征及高压测试。

title: Quasinormal mode quantization of bound and propagating photons in complex lightguiding nanostructures for integrated devices
summary: Open optical or plasmonic resonators are placed on and connected through surfaces or via waveguides, forming complex lightguiding nanostructures, e.g. for integrated photonic quantum devices. We derive general boundary conditions for quasinormal modes that account for the structure's specific geometry. We then present a general quantization scheme for multiple, interacting quasinormal-mode cavities coupled to quantum emitters and to a non-bosonic bath of propagating photons on waveguides or a surface. We derive a system-bath Hamiltonian with rigorously defined coupling elements that can be computed using Maxwell solvers, including light-matter coupling between the electromagnetic field and quantum emitters. We define system-bath correlation functions for an effective, bath-mediated, and time-delayed interaction between the quasinormal modes and quantum emitters, which is a main ingredient commonly used to simulate open quantum system dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了适用于复杂几何结构的准正规模边界条件，并提出了一个通用的量子化方案，用于处理多个相互作用的准正规模腔体与量子发射体及非玻色子波导/表面传播光子浴的耦合，最终建立了可计算的系统-浴相互作用哈密顿量及有效时延相互作用关联函数。
AI.motivation: 现有的准正规模量子理论难以处理复杂几何结构（如集成光子量子器件中的表面/波导连接结构），需要建立更通用的边界条件和量子化框架来支持多腔体、量子发射体与传播光子浴的耦合系统模拟。
AI.method: 1. 推导了适应具体结构几何的准正规模通用边界条件；2. 提出了多腔体准正规模与量子发射体、非玻色子浴耦合的量子化方案；3. 利用Maxwell求解器计算严格定义的耦合元，导出系统-浴哈密顿量；4. 定义了基于浴介导的时延相互作用关联函数。
AI.result: 成功建立了包含精确耦合元计算路径的系统-浴哈密顿量，并定义了可用于开放量子系统动力学模拟的浴介导时延相互作用关联函数。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为复杂纳米光波导结构中的光-物质相互作用提供了完整的准正规模理论框架，适用于集成光子量子器件中开放量子系统动力学的模拟。

title: Fabrication and transfer of ultra-thin YBa$2$Cu$3$O$_{7-x}$ film on SrTiO$_3$ nanomembrane
summary: The fabrication of free-standing ultra-thin films from high-temperature (high-Tc) superconductors is of great interest for the development of superconducting nanowire single-photon detectors with high operating temperatures. We successfully fabricate a millimeter-sized, high-quality, ultra-thin YBa$2$Cu$3$O$_{7-x}$ (YBCO) film on an SrTiO$_3$/Sr$_{1.5}$Ca$_{1.5}$Al$_2$O$_6$ (STO/SCAO) bilayer using high-pressure sputtering. The STO nanomembranes with the YBCO films are released by dissolving the water-soluble SCAO sacrificial layer and transferred onto the SiO2/Si substrate. X-ray diffraction confirms that STO and YBCO crystallinity is preserved following transfer onto SiO2/Si substrates. Microbridges patterned from the transferred YBCO films exhibit a critical temperature of 88.8 K and a critical current density of 6.8 MA/cm2 at 77 K, demonstrating robust superconducting transport after transfer. The thermal boundary conductance across the van der Waals interface between the STO nanomembrane with YBCO film and the SiO2/Si substrate, measured over 15-75 K, is significantly reduced compared to that of epitaxial YBCO film on bulk STO leading to modified energy relaxation and enhanced stability of transient resistive states. These results establish ultra-thin YBCO films on optically transparent STO nanomembranes as a platform for integrating high-Tc superconducting devices with SiO2/Si-based photonic structures.

AI.tldr: 本研究成功制备了毫米级高品质超薄YBCO薄膜，并转移到SiO2/Si衬底上，实现了88.8 K的超导转变温度和6.8 MA/cm²的临界电流密度，为高温超导器件与硅基光子结构的集成提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 开发可在较高温度下工作的超导纳米线单光子探测器（SNSPD），需要制备高温超导体（如YBCO）的自支撑超薄膜。
AI.method: 采用高压溅射法在STO/SCAO双层衬底上生长YBCO薄膜，利用SCAO牺牲层的水溶性释放STO/YBCO薄膜，并转移到SiO2/Si衬底上。
AI.result: 转移后的YBCO薄膜保持良好结晶性，微桥结构呈现88.8 K的临界温度和77 K下6.8 MA/cm²的临界电流密度；热边界电导显著降低，增强了瞬态电阻态的稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 超薄YBCO薄膜在光学透明的STO纳米膜上成功转移至SiO2/Si衬底，为高温超导器件与硅基光子结构的集成铺平了道路。

title: Competing incommensurability, electronic correlations, and superconductivity in a hybrid transition metal dichalcogenide
summary: The engineering of superlattices in two-dimensional van der Waals materials has enabled the realization of rich phase diagrams hosting topological and strongly correlated phases. While incommensurability is widespread in three-dimensional systems, the role of moiré potentials in bulk materials remains largely unexplored. Here, using scanning tunneling microscopy, we demonstrate that a bulk transition-metal dichalcogenide polytype, 4Hb-TaS$_2$, hosts an emergent incommensurate potential between its alternating 1T and 1H layers. Interplay with a concomitant incommensurate charge-density wave suppresses the long-range order of this potential, leading to intricate coupling with electronic correlations in the doped 1T surface layer. Combining density functional theory with dynamical mean-field theory, we show that the lattice mismatch locally modulates the interlayer distance, thereby tuning both hybridization and charge transfer between the correlated 1T and metallic 1H layers. This redistribution of charge drives the system towards a doped Mott regime, in which the remaining local moments become self-screened, giving rise to a zero-bias resonance. We further find that bulk superconductivity competes with both the underlying landscape and the associated charge transfer. Our results establish incommensurate potentials as a previously overlooked ingredient in hybrid transition-metal dichalcogenides, highlighting their central role in the interplay between electronic correlations, charge-density-wave order, and unconventional superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文通过扫描隧道显微镜发现，块体材料4Hb-TaS₂中1T和1H层间存在非公度莫尔势，该势与电荷密度波相互作用，调控层间杂化与电荷转移，驱动体系进入掺杂Mott regime，并影响超导性。
AI.motivation: 探索块体材料中非公度莫尔势的角色——二维材料中已广泛研究，但在块体体系中尚未被充分认识。
AI.method: 扫描隧道显微镜（STM）实验观测+密度泛函理论（DFT）+动力学平均场理论（DMFT）计算。
AI.result: 发现非公度势抑制长程有序，通过调制层间距调控杂化和电荷转移，驱动体系进入掺杂Mott态，产生零偏压共振；超导与这一势场及电荷转移存在竞争关系。
AI.conclusion: 非公度势是混合过渡金属硫族化物中被忽视的关键因素，深刻影响电子关联、电荷密度波和非常规超导的相互作用。

title: Optical anisotropy and electronic states in the pleochroic material Ca$_3$ReO$_5$Cl$_2$
summary: Pleochroism is a type of optical anisotropy in which the apparent color of a material varies depending on the polarization and propagation direction of incident light. The oxychloride compound Ca$_3$ReO$_5$Cl$_2$ has recently attracted attention due to its pronounced pleochroism. The paramagnetic state of this compound, characterized by localized Re 5$d$ electrons, is challenging to describe within conventional first-principles methods. In this study, we investigate the optical anisotropy in Ca$_3$ReO$_5$Cl$_2$ using first-principles calculations, with particular focus on the relationship between the optical spectra and electronic states. We employ a ferromagnetically ordered state to effectively capture the localized character of the Re 5$d$ electrons. The calculated dielectric function and absorption coefficient qualitatively reproduce the experimentally observed peak structures. An orbital-resolved analysis indicates that the characteristic optical transitions associated with the pleochroism predominantly involve Re-$d$-dominated electronic states, highlighting the key role of the Re $d$ electrons in the pleochroic optical response of Ca$_3$ReO$_5$Cl$_2$.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算研究了Ca₃ReO₅Cl₂的光学各向异性（多色性），发现其颜色变化主要由Re 5d电子的局域化特征驱动，通过铁磁有序态模拟成功再现了实验吸收峰结构。
AI.motivation: Ca₃ReO₅Cl₂具有显著的多色性（pleochroism），但其顺磁态中局域化的Re 5d电子难以用传统第一性原理方法准确描述，因此需要发展有效的计算策略来揭示其光学各向异性的电子起源。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，通过构建铁磁有序态来有效模拟Re 5d电子的局域化特征，计算了介电函数和吸收系数，并进行了轨道分辨分析。
AI.result: 计算得到的介电函数和吸收系数在峰值结构上定性与实验吻合；轨道分辨分析表明多色性相关的特征光学跃迁主要涉及Re-d主导的电子态。
AI.conclusion: Re d电子是Ca₃ReO₅Cl₂多色性光学响应的关键因素，铁磁有序态近似可作为研究此类局域电子体系光学性质的可行方法。

title: Nonlinear frequency shift and bistability of magnon-polarons
summary: We investigate the nonlinear dynamics of strongly coupled surface acoustic waves (SAWs) and spin waves (SWs) in a magnetoacoustic resonator based on a YIG/ZnO heterostructure by combining microwave reflection measurements with microfocused Brillouin light scattering spectroscopy. In the linear regime, the electrical response reveals clear hybridization between standing SAW cavity modes and finite-wave-vector SWs, resulting in pronounced avoided crossings. At elevated drive powers, the hybrid system exhibits a strongly field-dependent nonlinear response characterized by a positive frequency shift of the driven SW mode. Using the vector Hamiltonian formalism for nonlinear spin-wave dynamics, we show that this shift is dominated by a cross-shift term. In our resonator geometry, this contribution becomes significant because the standing SAW cavity mode simultaneously excites counterpropagating SWs with wave vectors $+k$ and $-k$. For suitable field detuning, the nonlinear shift drives the SW mode into resonance with the SAW excitation, leading to a strong enhancement of the magnon population, broadband nonlinear scattering, and bistable foldover behavior. Beyond the foldover threshold, both the magnon and phonon responses stabilize. These results establish SAW-driven $k \neq 0$ magnon-phonon hybrids as a promising platform for nonlinear magnetoacoustics and wave-based information processing.

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于YIG/ZnO异质结构的磁声谐振器中，强耦合表面声波（SAW）与自旋波（SW）的非线性动力学。通过微波反射测量与显微聚焦布里渊光散射光谱，观察到线性区SAW腔模与有限波矢自旋波的杂化，以及非线性区场依赖的正频移、双稳态折叠等行为，揭示了交叉频移项的关键作用，为非线性磁声学与信息处理提供新平台。
AI.motivation: 探索强耦合SAW与SW在非线性区的动力学行为，理解其非线性频移机制，特别是交叉频移项的贡献，并为基于磁声耦合的非线性信息处理提供物理基础。
AI.method: 采用微波反射测量与显微聚焦布里渊光散射光谱相结合的实验手段，并利用自旋波非线性动力学的矢量哈密顿形式理论分析非线性频移来源。
AI.result: 发现：线性区SAW腔模与有限波矢SW形成回避交叉；非线性区驱动自旋波出现正频移，主要由交叉频移项主导；由于SAW腔模同时激发相向传播的+/-k自旋波，交叉频移显著；在合适场失谐下，非线性频移使SW与SAW共振，增强磁振子布居、宽带非线性散射及双稳态折叠；越过折叠阈值后，磁振子和声子响应趋于稳定。
AI.conclusion: SAW驱动下的k≠0磁振子-声子杂化体系是非线性磁声学与波基信息处理的有前景平台。

title: Current-driven reduction of topological protection in multichannel superconductors
summary: We investigate the robustness of topological phases in a Kitaev ladder composed of two coupled superconducting chains under the perturbing influence of a finite charge current. By introducing an effective Hamiltonian depending on the quasiparticle momentum induced by the current, we show that the two-mode topological phase, present in the isolated ladder, is fragile against a finite current flux. To characterize this behavior, we combine bulk topological invariants with real-space diagnostics, including the edge-edge quantum conditional mutual information Iee, which provides an entanglement-based signature of topological order. Our results provide an effective framework to describe how current injection and measurement processes can affect topological protection in superconducting nanostructures.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Kitaev梯子（由两条耦合超导链组成）在有限电荷电流扰动下拓扑相位的鲁棒性。通过引入依赖于电流诱导的准粒子动量的有效哈密顿量，发现孤立梯子中的双模拓扑相在有限电流通量下是脆弱的。结合体拓扑不变量和实空间诊断（包括边缘-边缘量子条件互信息Iee），为描述电流注入和测量过程如何影响超导纳米结构中的拓扑保护提供了有效框架。
AI.motivation: 探究有限电荷电流对Kitaev梯子拓扑相位的稳定性和鲁棒性的影响，理解电流如何破坏拓扑保护。
AI.method: 引入依赖于电流诱导准粒子动量的有效哈密顿量，结合体拓扑不变量与实空间诊断（量子条件互信息Iee）进行分析。
AI.result: 发现孤立Kitaev梯子中的双模拓扑相在有限电流通量下是脆弱的，即电流会破坏拓扑保护。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一个描述电流注入和测量如何影响超导纳米结构中拓扑保护的框架。

title: Nonlinear Magnon Magnetic Moment Transport in Triangular-Lattice f-Wave Antialtermagnets
summary: We study the spin excitations in the frustrated coplanar 120-degree ground state of the triangular-lattice Heisenberg antiferromagnet and demonstrate that they carry a magnetic moment perpendicular to the plane in which the spins order, despite the ground-state sublattice moments having no out-of-plane component. The symmetry of the momentum dependence of the magnetic moment and energy of the magnons renders the system an odd-parity f-wave magnet. Extending this model to a stack of antiferromagnetically coupled triangular layers provides a realization of magnons in a three-dimensional f-wave antialtermagnet. We show that nonlinear thermal transport effects of magnons, such as Edelstein and spin-splitter effects, provide clear experimental signatures of magnons in f-wave antialtermagnets.

AI.tldr: 本文研究三角晶格海森堡反铁磁体中受挫的共面120度基态的自旋激发，发现磁振子携带垂直磁矩，形成奇宇称f波磁体，并推广到三维f波反交变磁体，揭示了磁振子的非线性热输运效应（如Edelstein和自旋分裂效应）可作为实验特征。
AI.motivation: 探索受挫三角晶格反铁磁体中自旋激发的异常磁矩行为，以及这种奇特的f波磁性在三维体系中的实现与实验观测可能性。
AI.method: 从三角晶格海森堡反铁磁体的共面120度基态出发，分析磁振子的对称性，扩展到反铁磁耦合的三角层堆叠结构，构建三维f波反交变磁体模型，并研究非线性热输运效应。
